title: Garlic Crumble Savory Stir Fry
description: A savory stir fry with a garlic crumble topping. This easy recipe is perfect for a quick weeknight dinner.
instructions: Heat a non-stick pan over medium-high heat.
Add savory and stir-fry for 3-4 minutes.
Add garlic and stir-fry for another minute.
Transfer the savory mixture to a bowl and set aside.
In the same pan, add crumble and stir-fry until golden brown.
Add shredded cheese and stir until melted.
Combine the savory mixture with the crumble topping.
